article_meta.title: The Corner NR PLUS Trade Breaking News: Americans Pay the Tariffs Their Government Imposes on Them By John R

reasoning: The model correctly flagged genuine bias in the author's prose and avoided quoted/attributed material, but used non-listed bias type labels and missed some additional biased phrasing.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged passages are in the author’s own voice; no quoted or clearly attributed WSJ/report text was treated as author bias.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Each flagged passage reflects genuine author-level spin/mocking language; none are neutral or purely sourced statements.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clear biased phrases in author prose such as 'Hold on a minute,' 'raked in,' and sarcastic flourishes about Adam Smith.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: All three labels (Slant/Partisan Bias, Loaded Language, Mockery/Sarcasm) are outside the allowed list; more fitting allowed types would be Spin/Slant, Word Choice, and Sensationalism/Emotionalism or Mudslinging.
